title: Epigenetic Aging and Treatment Response to Semaglutide in the SLIM LIVER Study
quantitative_reporting: Abstract reports within-cohort median changes and IQRs for DunedinPACE, PCGrimAge, and PCDNAmTL; no randomized between-arm effect estimate with CI
reason_for_exclusion_or_limit: Single-arm design and no generic inverse-variance between-group estimate

title: Exercise and epigenetic ages in older adults with myeloid malignancies
quantitative_reporting: Abstract reports correlations between changes in function and changes in accelerated GrimAge, PhenoAge, and DunedinPACE; no treatment-vs-control effect estimate with CI
reason_for_exclusion_or_limit: Association analysis only; not a poolable intervention contrast

title: Potential reversal of epigenetic age using a diet and lifestyle intervention: a pilot randomized clinical trial
quantitative_reporting: Reports between-group Horvath DNAmAge difference and p-value, but no direct CI or SE
reason_for_exclusion_or_limit: Quantified and retained in working dataset only because uncertainty is reconstructed rather than directly reported

title: Fasting-mimicking diet causes hepatic and blood markers changes indicating reduced biological age and disease risk
quantitative_reporting: Reports median biological-age change and Wilcoxon statistics; source data omit directly poolable arm-level biological-age uncertainty
reason_for_exclusion_or_limit: No primary-pool-ready between-arm biological-age effect with directly extractable variance

title: The effect of polyphenols on DNA methylation-assessed biological age attenuation: the DIRECT PLUS randomized controlled trial
quantitative_reporting: Full text states that all interventions did not differ in changes between methylation clocks; reported positive signals are adherence-based multivariable betas for Li and Hannum clocks rather than randomized between-arm effect estimates with CI
reason_for_exclusion_or_limit: Peer-reviewed and full text accessible, but no poolable randomized between-group clock contrast with directly extractable uncertainty

title: Multi-Omics Analysis Reveals Biomarkers That Contribute to Biological Age Rejuvenation in Response to Single-Blinded Randomized Placebo-Controlled Therapeutic Plasma Exchange
quantitative_reporting: PubMed abstract confirms randomized placebo-controlled design and reports that 15 epigenetic clocks improved versus placebo, but accessible primary metadata do not provide per-clock effect estimates or confidence intervals
reason_for_exclusion_or_limit: No directly extractable clock-specific between-group estimate with CI from accessible primary sources; PMC full text is embargoed until 2027-02-04

title: Effect of Pitavastatin on Epigenetic Aging Biomarkers in People With HIV: Pilot Substudy of the REPRIEVE Trial
quantitative_reporting: PubMed abstract reports randomized-arm medians and IQRs for DunedinPACE change plus a treatment-group p-value, but no confidence interval or model-based standard error for the between-arm contrast
reason_for_exclusion_or_limit: Randomized and peer-reviewed, but accessible primary metadata do not provide a generic inverse-variance effect estimate for DunedinPACE or PCGrimAge; publisher full text was not accessible through the current automated route
